SEARCH

Package sc.fiji.snt.tracing.auto.gwdt

package sc.fiji.snt.tracing.auto.gwdt
Storage backends for the Gray-Weighted Distance Transform (GWDT) tracing algorithm.

Provides pluggable storage strategies for GWDT and Fast Marching data structures, including in-memory (ArrayStorageBackend), disk-backed (DiskBackedStorageBackend), and sparse (SparseStorageBackend) implementations. These backends manage distance values, parent pointers, and voxel state arrays used during geodesic distance computation.

See Also:
  • GWDTTracer
  • StorageBackend
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    sc.fiji.snt.tracing.auto
    Automatic neuron tracing algorithms that reconstruct complete neuronal morphologies from images without user interaction.
  • Class
    Description
    ArrayStorageBackend
    In-memory array storage backend using ImgLib2 ArrayImgs.
    DiskBackedStorageBackend
    Disk-backed storage backend for very large images.
    SparseStorageBackend
    Sparse storage backend using hash maps for memory-efficient tracing.
    StorageBackend
    Storage backend for GWDT tracing data structures.
